note: Website banner refresh after Sprint 5.32: rewrote the Trinity Useful Compute stack section on sost-explorer.html to reflect the full Sprint 5.6 - 5.32 surface. Updated headline counters to 43 trinity scripts / 20 strict schemas / 1288 tests PASS (was 14 scripts / 9 strict schemas / 808+ tests PASS at the close of Sprint 5.18d). Added a new // AUTONOMY + SCIENTIFIC INPUT STACK banner directly below the original // USEFUL COMPUTE STACK banner, documenting the 14 post-5.18d sprints in a 12-row table: 5.19 operator loop, 5.20 scientific prompt intake, 5.21/5.22 intake -> task_builder bridge + hotfixes, 5.23 autonomy governor, 5.24 operator-loop x governor hook, 5.25 governor watchdog, 5.26 task queue, 5.27 task queue runner, 5.28 queue dashboard, 5.29 scientific intake readers, 5.30 reader metadata in request, 5.31 scientific task classifier, 5.32 materials_engine deterministic backend. The new banner uses the purple #8b5cf6 / #a78bfa palette to visually distinguish the off-chain autonomy stack from the original orange Useful Compute on-chain stack; same audit-trail style with sprint number / layer / what-it-ships / artefact columns. Added four pills: autonomy pipeline (enqueue -> run-batch -> operator_loop+governor -> watchdog -> completed/failed -> dashboard), scientific pipeline (intake -> classifier -> task_builder -> materials_engine -> ranked compute_output), fail-closed conditions (halt_file_present, policy_mutated_at_runtime, watchdog safety_status=critical, operator_loop rc != 0), hard caps (governor mode=observe locked, autonomous_sost_stocks=0, run-batch max-items=50, run-batch sleep_seconds=3600, pdf max pages=200). Updated the Backend kinds pill: real_backend went from 'reserved, 0 in v0.1' to '1 live: local_materials_engine_v01 (sprint 5.32)'. Updated the 'Where the stack stops' paragraph to clarify that Sprint 5.18d closed the ON-CHAIN chain; 5.19-5.32 stay off-chain and extend Trinity in two parallel directions (operational autonomy + scientific input + first real backend). Added a 'What this is NOT' disclaimer pill at the bottom of the new banner: the 14 post-5.18d sprints add ZERO new on-chain capability — governor cannot pay, watchdog cannot dispatch externally (v0.1), queue cannot retry, runner is bounded, classifier has no model, materials_engine reads a hand-curated table pinned in source; no wallet access, no signing, no broadcast, no LLM, no network from any of these 14 sprints. Updated the Trinity Useful Compute panel header (website/trinity-useful-compute.html h1 + sub) to declare 'v1.0 sprints 5.6 - 5.32 - on-chain + autonomy + scientific intake + materials_engine' with a layered stack subtitle and the same 43/20/26/1288 counters. Pure HTML + JSON copy update: zero code changes, zero schema changes, zero test changes, zero on-chain behaviour change. This bump (v258) just refreshes the visitor-facing banner; the autoreload watcher on sost-explorer.html picks it up within 60s and reloads any open tab that is not in the detail-panel view.
